feed.title: Kiyomizu’s Homepage
feed.subtitle: Matthew 7:13 “Enter in by the narrow gate; for the gate is wide and the way is broad that leads to destruction, and there are many who enter in by it.

entry.title: The very beginning | 最初
entry.content:
This is my first blog article, in memory of those idyllic golden days in Kyoto, Japan.

The contents in the site will be written in both standard Chinese and poor English, as the former is my mother tongue. This site is using the default theme of Jekyll. I’m trying to make it rich in content rather than in format.

这是我的第一篇博客，我用它纪念在京都的日子，那时我无忧无虑。

我以汉语为母语，但本站的内容将同时使用中英文写作。 本站使用Jekyll的默认模板。我努力使它的内容超过形式。
entry.summary: This is my first blog article, in memory of those idyllic golden days in Kyoto, Japan.
